Meta.defaultDescription: Yıldız Technical University Blockchain Club — a student community learning, building and sharing around blockchain, DeFi, zero-knowledge and open source.

home.title: YTÜ Blockchain Club — Blockchain, DeFi & Open Source Community
home.description: Yıldız Technical University Blockchain Club — a student community learning and building around blockchain, DeFi, zero-knowledge and open source.

about.title: About
about.description: The story, mission and team behind YTÜ Blockchain Club.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Blockchain and open-source projects built by our club members.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Articles and technical analyses on blockchain, Ethereum, stablecoins and zero-knowledge.

community.title: Community
community.description: Join the YTÜ Blockchain community on Telegram, GitHub and X.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.description: Sponsor YTÜ Blockchain Club — partnership and support opportunities.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with YTÜ Blockchain Club for questions and collaborations.

join.title: Join
join.description: Become a member of YTÜ Blockchain Club — learn, build and be part of the community.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.lead: We want to make blockchain something students at YTÜ can learn, build, and share.
mission.leadRest: We are building a community where every curious student has support on the path from idea to production.
mission.body: Across DeFi, zero-knowledge proofs, smart contracts, and open source, we learn and build together through workshops, projects, and events.

values.heading: Core Values
values.intro: The principles that guide every decision, from the team to what we ship.

learn.title: Learn by Building
learn.description: We don't just read — we learn by building through workshops, projects, and hackathons.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: We share what we build — code, docs, and materials are open to everyone.

community.title: Build Together
community.description: We're open to everyone across departments and levels; the best work happens together.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Security is essential on-chain; we learn good practices from the start.

team.heading: Team
team.intro: The students who run the club together.

sponsors.heading: Sponsors & Partners
sponsors.intro: Organizations that support our community. You can be one of them.

join.heading: Join the Club
join.intro: Curious about blockchain? No experience required — we learn together.
join.areasHint: Pick your interest when you apply
join.contactLead: Have a different area in mind?
join.contactRest: — we're always happy to meet new people.
